inputs.srepr: MutableDenseMatrix([[Function('W_x')(Symbol('x', real=True), Symbol('y', real=True), Symbol('z', real=True))], [Function('W_y')(Symbol('x', real=True), Symbol('y', real=True), Symbol('z', real=True))], [Function('W_z')(Symbol('x', real=True), Symbol('y', real=True), Symbol('z', real=True))]])

method: simplify(curl curl W - (grad div W - Delta W))
